- Pilot group cut median environment setup time from 95 minutes to 28 minutes after the migration.
- Two legacy printer workflows still require a Windows fallback path for a small operations subgroup.
- Helpdesk tickets dropped from 14 per week to 5 per week after the first two onboarding waves.
- Security reported faster patch verification because the pilot reduced unmanaged local admin usage.
- Finance noted that expanding the pilot before printer remediation could create avoidable retraining churn.
- The platform team already prepared a documented rollback runbook and a staged cutover checklist.
